# VenetianMask

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::VenetianMask;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        VenetianMask { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
mask, masquerade, impersonate, secret, incognito

## Categories
account, gaming

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/venetian-mask)
